examples: On the medallion was painted the picture of a Marionette.
John was studying the medallion in the evidence bag – the killer's calling card.
Around her neck she wore a long gold chain, from which hung a large medallion.
To operate a yellow cab and solicit passengers on the street you need a medallion.
Medallion and Bergeron also purchased the rights to Petty's name in perpetuity for Nascar-related deals.
